# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

This is a personal GitHub Pages website (`oneshot0.github.io`) — a presentation/portfolio page.

## Repository Structure

- `README.md` — Project description
- `index.html` — Main entry point for the GitHub Pages site (if present)
- `.github/` — GitHub configuration and Copilot instructions

## Guidelines

- This site is written primarily in **Spanish**.
- Keep the code simple, clean, and accessible.
- Follow standard HTML/CSS/JavaScript best practices for static sites.
- Ensure any new pages or components are responsive and mobile-friendly.
- Prefer semantic HTML elements for better accessibility and SEO.
- When adding styles, use consistent formatting and naming conventions.
- Avoid introducing unnecessary dependencies; keep the site lightweight.
